name: GIGABYTE B860I AORUS PRO ICE Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9066(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C with DP-Alt - DisplayPort 2.1 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: GIGABYTE B860I AORUS PRO ICE Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Compact mini-ITX high-performance motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 7.
